title: Update endpoint validates empty title/author beyond spec
evidence: src/main.rs:107-122 — update_book rejects empty-string title/author, though spec only requires validation on create
suggestion: No action needed — this is a defensive enhancement beyond R9

title: Mutex-based connection sharing limits concurrency
evidence: src/main.rs:18 — type AppState = Arc<Mutex<Connection>>; single connection behind a mutex serializes all DB access
suggestion: Consider r2d2 or deadpool connection pool for production use
